use_cases: Primary site navigation with engaging hover animations
Sidebar or header navigation menus for web applications
Tab-like navigation with smooth visual feedback
Icon-text menu items with animated highlighting
ai_summary: A navigation component featuring four menu links (Home, Learn, Quiz, Ask) with smooth clip-path animations triggered on hover. The effect uses Framer Motion's useSpring and useMotionTemplate to create a sliding overlay that reveals a blue accent border and icon. Ideal for educational platforms or dashboard-style applications requiring interactive navigation elements.
